destinations.evidence: Commitment TTL is a bounded payload/lock parameter, not elapsed commitment-age rejection.
destinations.snippet: validate_commitment_structure rejects malformed/bounds only; no blocks_since_commit/ttl elapsed rejection.

destinations.evidence: Settlement expiry is enforced on async job expiry state.
Nodebuilder verifier hook re-simulates against inclusion parent state without old commit_block TTL age.
Current commitment shape cannot implement old commit_block age rejection on the transaction itself.
destinations.snippet: TxAsyncCommitment has ttl but no commit_block field; simulation block inferred at verification time.

equivalence_argument: The old invalid commitment-age TTL rejection is absent; TTL is checked for structure/wallet horizon while actual settlement expiry is enforced via job.expiry_block.

related_but_insufficient_code: Pool computes contract_expiry_block for lifecycle, and wallet checks lock horizon; neither is verifier-side commitment-age rejection.

notes: Mapped in port verifier with nodebuilder and Alloy shape evidence.
rationale: The commitment verifier candidate removes an invalid TTL-expiry rejection for commitments and leaves max_block_lookback as the relevant age guard.
statement: Async commitment verification must not reject a commitment merely because current_block_number - commit_block exceeds commitment.ttl; it should reject only when blocks_since_commit exceeds max_block_lookback for historical state access.
suggested_falsification_tests: Verify a commitment with blocks_since_commit greater than ttl but not greater than max_block_lookback and assert it is accepted with respect to TTL expiry; verify one older than max_block_lookback and assert it is rejected for historical state access.
summary: Commitment verification does not enforce settlement TTL as elapsed commitment age, while settlement expiry remains enforced.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Verify an async commitment with small ttl and valid simulator/wallet lock does not fail on elapsed TTL; separately assert settlement job past expiry fails.
title: Commitment verification does not enforce settlement TTL
